200.description: Map of available extras keyed by extra_name_id, with pricing and quantity limits

additionalProperties.description: A bookable extra / add-on available for a property

extra_name_id.description: Extra type identifier (references the extra_names lookup table)

price.description: Price for this extra in GBP

name.description: Human-readable name of the extra (e.g. Dog, Cot, High Chair, Log Basket)

max_num.description: Maximum quantity a guest can book (e.g. max 2 dogs)

per_night.description: Whether the price is charged per night (true) or per stay (false)

unit.description: Pricing unit: per_stay, per_night, or per_week

additionalProperties.title: Extra

403.description: Invalid API key, IP not whitelisted, or origin not allowed

schema.description: Standard error response returned by all endpoints when a request fails (4xx/5xx)

statusCode.description: HTTP status code indicating the type of error

message.description: Human-readable error message, or an array of validation error strings for 422 responses

error.description: Short error label matching the HTTP status text

schema.title: Error

schema.description: Standard error response returned by all endpoints when a request fails (4xx/5xx)

statusCode.description: HTTP status code indicating the type of error

message.description: Human-readable error message, or an array of validation error strings for 422 responses

error.description: Short error label matching the HTTP status text

schema.title: Error

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check Retry-After header

schema.description: Error response returned when a client exceeds their configured rate limit

retryAfter.description: Number of seconds the client should wait before retrying

schema.title: RateLimitError
